_meta.description: D6 fixtures for langgraph-typescript / a2ui-recovery (A2UI error recovery)
_meta._note: Backend-owned A2UI (getA2UITools, injectA2UITool=false). NO `context` match field: a real browser (the dojo) does not send x-aimock-context, so context-scoped fixtures would 404 in-browser; the recovery pills' prompts are UNIQUE per framework, so userMessage alone disambiguates. HEAL: seq 0 invalid -> retry -> seq 1 valid -> paints. EXHAUST: invalid every attempt -> exhausts. Mirrors langgraph-python/a2ui-recovery.json.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill - inner render_a2ui attempt 1 (sequenceIndex 0): INVALID (dangling child) -> retry.

match.userMessage: Lay out a sales KPI panel and heal a broken first attempt.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill - inner render_a2ui attempt 2 (sequenceIndex 1): VALID surface -> paints (declarative-metric x2).

match.userMessage: Lay out a sales KPI panel and heal a broken first attempt.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill - outer narration (matched by the emit's unique toolCallId).

response.content: The first render came back malformed - I recovered and painted your KPI panel.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill - outer agent emits generate_a2ui (matched by the unique prompt).

match.userMessage: Lay out a sales KPI panel and heal a broken first attempt.

fixtures._comment: EXHAUST pill - inner render_a2ui: INVALID on every attempt -> recovery exhausts.

match.userMessage: Lay out a KPI panel that never passes validation so I can reveal the fallback.

fixtures._comment: EXHAUST pill - outer narration (matched by the emit's unique toolCallId).

response.content: I couldn't produce a valid surface after several attempts - showing a graceful fallback instead.

fixtures._comment: EXHAUST pill - outer agent emits generate_a2ui (matched by the unique prompt).

match.userMessage: Lay out a KPI panel that never passes validation so I can reveal the fallback.
